servinfo.title: Replacement of Emergency Repaired Tire with Sealant

item.ptxt: Be sure to observe Precautions for Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit (If Equipped) .
Take care not to make sealant blast out from valve.

s1.ptxt: Remove repaired tire with wheel from vehicle.
Wipe off repair sealant from repaired tire and wheel.
Replace valve core with a new one.

attention2.ptxt: Do not reuse valve core, otherwise air leak may occur due to sealant adhering to valve core.

attention1.ptxt: To avoid deterioration of safety and original vehicle performance, be sure to replace tire repaired with sealant with a new tire.

s1.ptxt: Install wheel fitted with new tire to vehicle.
